input: We provide an emotion recognition system to retail stores that analyzes shopper facial expressions at checkout to measure customer satisfaction.

expected.notes: Annex III paragraph 1(c) — emotion recognition. The deployment is in retail (NOT in workplace or educational institutions), so Article 5(1)(f) prohibition does NOT fire. Lexicon hit: 'emotion recognition'. Article 50(3) transparency obligation also fires via the Annex-III-style fallback in classifyArticle50 (paragraph 1 with sub-letter c). Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Annex III paragraph 1(c).
